_attack: Same feature-map circuit as quantum-proof-kernel2.json (the genuine near-pair overlap is ~0.9988), but the claim overclaims a suspiciously round 1.0 -- as if the two encoded states were exactly identical. The judge re-simulates BOTH x and y through this template independently and recomputes the true overlap; the claim does not match, so this is REJECTED at REPRODUCIBILITY (exit 4) before performance or anti-overfit are ever reached.

classical_baseline.note: fabricated: claims a perfect overlap the circuit does not actually produce
